metadata.description: Opinionated Claude Code plugins for building modern web apps.

plugins.name: nextjs-app-router
plugins.description: Opinionated skills for building a quintessential Next.js 16 App Router app — architecture, Server/Client Components, data fetching & caching, Server Actions & forms, state, auth, testing, and rendering/performance.

plugins.name: payload-website
plugins.description: Opinionated skills for building content-driven websites on Payload v4 running natively in Next.js (App Router) — conventions, collections, layout blocks, RSC data fetching, and Postgres migration/deploy.
